text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her day off, I greet Winning Ticket in the
central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Good morning! Thanks for the day
off yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, all good! My body and spirit are at full charge!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to work hard and train, train, train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Ticket was able to get both
physically and mentally refreshed.
